task: R5 #275 — State DOT/motor-carrier compliance overlay (deep harvest)
disclaimer: Operational compliance research and cited public-records compilation — not legal advice. Confirm DOT/FMCSA carrier registration, HOS, vehicle, and insurance requirements with FMCSA and the relevant state authority.
policy: Public .gov sources only; 403/SSL = park; gaps explicit.

cited_facts.text: Tennessee Highway Patrol Commercial Vehicle Enforcement regulates commercial motor vehicle safety; TN.gov agency pages returned 403/404 at R5-B reprobe — confirm current CVE registration requirements with TN Dept of Safety.

citation.source: TN Dept of Safety — Motor Carrier (regulator anchor)
citation.agency: Tennessee Department of Safety and Homeland Security

cited_facts.text: Tennessee intrastate CMV hours-of-service rules align with federal Part 395 for interstate carriers; CVE enforces HOS during roadside inspections.

citation.source: TN Dept of Safety — Motor Carrier (regulator anchor)
citation.agency: Tennessee Department of Safety and Homeland Security

cited_facts.text: Tennessee CVE performs CMV safety inspections on state highways; agency subpages blocked at harvest.

citation.source: TN Dept of Safety — Motor Carrier (regulator anchor)
citation.agency: Tennessee Department of Safety and Homeland Security

cited_facts.text: Interstate carriers in Tennessee must maintain federal Part 387 liability minimums; intrastate for-hire carriers must confirm state insurance filings with TN CVE when agency pages restore.

citation.source: TN Dept of Safety — Motor Carrier (regulator anchor)
citation.agency: Tennessee Department of Safety and Homeland Security

cited_facts.text: Tennessee distinguishes interstate carriers (USDOT/FMCSA + UCR) from intrastate CMV operations enforced by Highway Patrol CVE — agency deep pages parked at R5-B reprobe.

citation.source: TN Dept of Safety — Motor Carrier (regulator anchor)
citation.agency: Tennessee Department of Safety and Homeland Security
